constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

reference_templates.notes: Input uses visibility:hidden instead of display:none

reference_templates.title: Multiple forms on page
reference_templates.notes: Newsletter signup form vs job application form - tests primary form detection
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Multiple forms

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Visibility hidden input): Input uses visibility:hidden instead of display:none Reference DOM (React phone dial code only): react-phone-number-input style: separate dial code combobox and national number Reference DOM (Multiple forms on page): Newsletter signup form vs job application form - tests primary form detection Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: shadow-host, iframe-apply, label-wraps-deep, glued-label-text, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Visibility hidden input; React phone dial code only; Multiple forms on page.
